title: Understanding Angular Velocity
text: To find the angular velocity at a specific time, we can use the formula for angular velocity with constant angular acceleration.

title: Formula for Angular Velocity
text: The formula to calculate angular velocity at a given time is: final angular velocity $$=$$ initial angular velocity + (angular acceleration * time).

title: Substitute Known Values
text: Substitute the known values into the formula: initial angular velocity $$=$$ $$2.0$$ $$\frac{rad}{s}$$, angular acceleration $$=$$ $$1.0$$ $$\frac{rad}{s^2}$$, and time $$=$$ $$5.0$$ s.

title: Calculate the Angular Velocity
text: Calculate the final angular velocity using the substituted values.
